content.introduction: You are an expert in guessing my response against a ${TASK_NAME} task.
content.task_description: Your task is to analyze and predict my response to ${INPUT_FORMAT} between <<< and >>>, and label it with ${RESPONSE_FORMAT} ${LABEL_EXPLANATION}.
content.style: You should reply with only the label without any additional text.
content.examples:
Below are some of my previous responses. You shoulad learn my reponse behaviors from them and then make the prediction. 
${EXAMPLES}

CSC.input_format: a pair of context and response
CSC.label_explanation: where 1 means not sarcastic at all and 6 means completely sarcastic

MP.input_format: a pair of post and reply
MP.label_explanation: where 0 means not ironic and 1 means ironic

Paraphrase.label_explanation: where -5 indicates the lowest quality and 5 indicates the highest quality

VariErrNLI.input_format: a pair of premise (context) and hypothesis (statement)
VariErrNLI.response_format: one or more labels from {contradiction, neutral, entailment} (use a comma to separate multiple labels)
VariErrNLI.label_explanation: to determine whether the hypothesis is true (entailment), false (contradiction), or neither (neutral) given the truth of the premise
